name: Arkansas Division of Developmental Disabilities Services (DDS)
description: State agency providing services and supports for individuals with developmental disabilities including waiver programs, case management, and community supports.

name: Arkansas Early Intervention (First Connections)
description: Part C early intervention program for infants and toddlers birth to age 3 with developmental delays, providing family-centered services and supports.

name: The Arc of Arkansas
description: Statewide nonprofit advocating for and with people with intellectual and developmental disabilities, providing resources and community support.

name: Special Olympics Arkansas
description: Year-round sports training and competition for children and adults with intellectual disabilities throughout Arkansas.

name: Disability Rights Arkansas
description: Federally designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal advocacy and rights protection for Arkansans with disabilities.
address: 400 W Capitol Ave, Suite 1200, Little Rock, AR 72201

name: Arkansas Lifespan Respite Coalition
description: Respite care resources and referrals for family caregivers of individuals with disabilities or special health care needs.

name: Camp Aldersgate
description: Year-round camp and retreat center providing inclusive outdoor experiences for children and adults with disabilities and special health needs.

name: INCREASING Capabilities Access Network (ICAN)
description: Arkansas assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, short-term loans, and assistance accessing AT solutions for individuals with disabilities.

name: Arkansas ABLE Account
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts allowing individuals with disabilities to save without losing eligibility for public benefits.

name: Arkansas Medicaid Waiver Programs (ARChoices)
description: Home and community-based Medicaid waiver programs enabling individuals with disabilities to receive services in their homes and communities.

name: Rock Region METRO Paratransit
description: Paratransit transportation services for individuals with disabilities in the Little Rock metropolitan area.

name: Arkansas Development Finance Authority - Accessible Housing
description: State housing finance agency providing accessible and affordable housing resources for individuals with disabilities.

name: UAMS Developmental Pediatrics
description: Developmental and behavioral pediatrics at the University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences, providing comprehensive evaluations and care for children with developmental concerns.

name: Easter Seals Arkansas Pediatric Therapy
description: Pediatric therapy services including physical, occupational, and speech therapy for children with disabilities.

name: Arkansas Rehabilitation Services - Employment
description: Vocational rehabilitation and employment services for individuals with disabilities seeking competitive integrated employment.
